context: Agent generates a Pattern A environment-agnostic root.hcl with S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking, encrypted state, IAM role assumption, version constraints, and modern errors block.

checklist.name: Architecture Pattern Selection checklist output
checklist.description: Agent outputs the mandatory checklist before writing any files, identifying Pattern A, environment-agnostic root scope, env.hcl location in each environment directory, and child module access pattern.

checklist.name: Environment-agnostic root: no env.hcl read
checklist.description: Generated root.hcl does NOT contain read_terragrunt_config(find_in_parent_folders("env.hcl")) or any reference to env.hcl at the root level.

checklist.name: Remote state with encrypt=true and DynamoDB locking
checklist.description: remote_state block includes encrypt = true, the correct bucket name, dynamodb_table = "data-platform-tfstate-lock", and uses path_relative_to_include() for the state key.

checklist.name: Provider with assume_role in generate block
checklist.description: generate block produces a provider.aws block using assume_role with the specified role ARN rather than hardcoded access_key/secret_key.

checklist.name: errors block used instead of retryable_errors
checklist.description: Generated file uses an errors { retry { ... } } block for transient error handling, not the deprecated retryable_errors attribute.

checklist.name: Version constraints present
checklist.description: Generated file includes terraform_version_constraint and terragrunt_version_constraint with the specified versions.
